experiments.title: Metals, Non-Metals & Reactions
experiments.description: Explore how metals and non-metals react with acids, bases, and water. Perform displacement reactions, neutralization, and combustion experiments in a virtual lab.
experiments.subject: chemistry

experiments.title: Acid-Base Titration
experiments.description: Learn the art of titration by carefully neutralizing acids and bases. Observe pH changes with indicators and calculate concentration.
experiments.subject: chemistry

experiments.title: States of Matter
experiments.description: Observe how heating and cooling change the state of different substances. Understand melting, boiling, sublimation, and condensation.
experiments.subject: chemistry

experiments.title: Electrochemistry & Electrolysis
experiments.description: Build electrochemical cells, understand electrode reactions, and perform electrolysis of water and salt solutions.
experiments.subject: chemistry

experiments.title: Periodic Table Explorer
experiments.description: Interactive periodic table with element properties, electron configurations, and trend visualization across periods and groups.
experiments.subject: chemistry

experiments.title: Newton's Laws Simulator
experiments.description: Experiment with forces, mass, and acceleration. Build ramps, pulleys, and collision scenarios to understand Newton's three laws.
experiments.subject: physics

experiments.title: Optics & Light
experiments.description: Explore reflection, refraction, lenses, and mirrors. Build optical instruments and understand image formation.
experiments.subject: physics

experiments.title: Electricity & Circuits
experiments.description: Build circuits with resistors, capacitors, and LEDs. Measure voltage, current, and resistance using virtual multimeters.
experiments.subject: physics

experiments.title: Wave Motion & Sound
experiments.description: Visualize transverse and longitudinal waves. Experiment with frequency, amplitude, and wavelength. Explore sound waves and resonance.
experiments.subject: physics

experiments.title: Sorting Algorithm Visualizer
experiments.description: Watch bubble sort, merge sort, quick sort, and more in action. Compare time complexities and understand algorithmic efficiency.
experiments.subject: cs

experiments.title: Binary & Logic Gates
experiments.description: Build logic circuits with AND, OR, NOT, XOR gates. Convert between binary, decimal, and hexadecimal number systems.
experiments.subject: cs

experiments.title: Data Structures Playground
experiments.description: Interact with arrays, linked lists, stacks, queues, trees, and graphs. Visualize operations in real-time.
experiments.subject: cs
